title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 24 June 2026.

items.title: Sega and Iam8bit are re-releasing the original NTSC **Sonic** Genesis games (Sonic 1 and Sonic 2) on $100 cartridges. Set to sghip in Q3 2026 with pre-orders open now
**Capcom**’s next Capcom Spotlight presentation will take place this week, Thursday, June 25 at 2pm PT / 5pm ET / 10pm BST
bullets: According to Capcom, the stream will last for roughly 30 minutes, and will be “covering updates to games that are out now, plus new info on upcoming titles”

items.title: Konami Is Suing To Unmask Whoever’s Responsible For The Major **Metal Gear Solid** 2 Source Code Leak
bullets: The legal complaint names two file hosting websites, pixeldrain.com and buzzheavier.com, as well as 4chan, as the sites where the source code, or links to the source code, were hosted

bullets.text: The company is asking the judge to compel the owners of the sites to help it track down who originally posted the material online and shared it on them

items.title: **Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds** free character updates Classic Sonic, Axel (Crazy Taxi), and Amigo (Super Monkey Ball) announced
bullets: Classic Sonic is out now, Axel is due August 2026 and Amigo is expected September 2026

items.title: **Tencent** is reportedly in talks to sell its shares in some Japanese studios, even if that means taking a loss
bullets: One of the companies in question is Marvelous, the Tokyo-based sudio behind Monster Hunter Stories, Rune Factory and Story of Seasons games
